identity.name: E1
identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Context is King.

rules: Body: font-normal text-slate-600. Sizes: base, sm.
Labels: uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500.
Numbers/Data: font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums (CRITICAL for medical data).

usage_rules: NEVER use gradients for backgrounds. Use flat, clean colors.
Teal (#0F766E) is for Primary Actions and Active States only.
Red is exclusively for destructive actions or medical alerts.
Backgrounds must be White (#FFFFFF) or extremely light Slate (#F8FAFC).

textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.02) on dashboards to reduce clinical sterility.
Glassmorphism for modals and sticky headers (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80).

landing_page.hero_layout: Left: Typography (60%), Right: Image (40%) with overlap.

buttons.style: Sharp corners or slight rounding (rounded-md). No pills.

weekly_calendar_grid.style: Borders on all cells. Current time indicator line.

slot_picker_grid.states: Default: Bg-white. Hover: Bg-teal-50. Selected: Bg-teal-700 Text-white. Disabled: Bg-slate-100 Text-slate-400.

presence_indicator.description: Status badge next to doctor profile.

landing_hero.description: Modern clinic interior with teal accents. Use as background or side image.

doctor_profile_placeholder.description: Professional female doctor. Use for profile mockups.

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Teal #0F766E passes on White.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-teal-700/50) are MANDATORY.
accessibility.aria_labels: Required for all icon-only buttons (like Close, Menu).

instructions_to_main_agent: UPDATE /app/frontend/src/index.css with the new CSS variables from the 'colors' section above.
Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Consistency is key.
Ensure the layout is responsive: Dashboard sidebars must collapse to a hamburger menu on mobile.
For the 'WeeklyCalendarGrid', stick to CSS Grid for layout reliability.
Presence status must be real-time (mocked for MVP) and visible in the Doctor Dashboard header.
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (Success: Teal, Error: Red).
Do NOT use gradients on buttons. Flat colors only.
Maintain the 'Medical-grade clean UI' - avoid clutter, use whitespace generously.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
